Flea Market (Items).description: A facility for selling items. By setting products in the sales list, you can sell items to other players. Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

Flea Market (Pals).description: A facility for selling Pals. By setting Pals in the sales list, you can sell them to other players. Assign an Ice Pal to it and the food inside will be less likely to spoil.

Flopie's Necklace.description: Collar for . If is in your team, it will stay by your side and automatically gather nearby items.

Flour.description: Flour made from grinding Wheat. It can be used as an ingredient in making Bread.

Flower Bed.description: Place in base to improve gathering speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Fluffy Pal Bed.description: A fluffy bed that Pals can get a good rest on. Pals can rest on it when injured, or to sleep at night. Pals love sleeping on fluffy beds like this.

Foxparks Cryst's Harness.description: Harness for holding . Activate its Partner Skill to hold and release freezing air to attack.

Foxparks's Harness.description: Harness for holding . Activate its Partner Skill to hold and attack using it as a flamethrower.

Frag Grenade.description: A Frag Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.

Fried Chikipi.description: Magnificently juicy poultry. Eating it will slightly increase work speed and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

Fried Egg.description: An Egg now fried and even more delicious. Great for keeping hunger away.

Fried Kelpsea.description: Crunchy fried batter perfectly accentuates the Kelpsea's plumpness. Eating it will increase by +10% and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

Future Technical Manual.description: A book that contains secrets of technology beyond current day comprehension. Use it to obtain lots of Technology Points.

Futuristic Structure Set.description: Set for building bases using futuristic architecture. Allows building of futuristic foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

Galeclaw Poultry.description: meat. Full of nutrition, its flavor packs a punch.

Galeclaw's Gloves.description: Gloves for modifying the performance of the equipped glider, if is in your team.

Giant Feed Bag.description: An enormous pouch for holding food. Unlocks 5 food slots in your inventory. Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry. Carrying one is enough.

Giant Pal Soul.description: The soul left behind by a highly trained Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Giga Glider.description: A glider for soaring through the air. With its capabilities improved, it can soar at high speeds.

Giga Grappling Gun.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. Using data from prototype versions, its capabilities have been further increased.

Giga Shield.description: Strange shield made with Paldium technology. It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while. Modifications have enhanced its effectiveness even further.

Giga Sphere.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Able to capture moderately powerful Pals.

Glass Structure Set.description: Set for building bases using glass. Allows building of glass foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

Global Palbox.description: A facility that can store the genetic data of Pals and allows you to reconstruct them from this data. The stored genetic data can also be transferred to other worlds.

Gold Coin.description: Currency traded on Palpagos Island. Can be exchanged for items or Pals with merchants.

Gold Key.description: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

Golden Crown.description: A rare golden crown. Just wearing it makes you feel like royalty.

Golden Crown Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Golden Crown (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Graduate Cap Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Graduation Cap (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Graduation Cap.description: A cap that makes its wearer feel smarter. Was there once a school on this island?

Grand Piano.description: Decorative grand piano. Cannot be played.

Grappling Gun.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. It allows for easy movement between places with varying elevation.

Grass Grenade.description: A Grass Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.

Grilled Chikipi.description: Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire. Light and refreshing on the tongue.

Grilled Galeclaw.description: Grilled meat full of vitality for flying high in the skies.

Grilled Kelpsea.description: Fresh fish grilled over a charcoal fire. Plump and juicy.

Grilled Lamball.description: Marinated mutton slow-cooked over a grill. Eating it will slightly increase work speed and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

Grinning Tocotoco Cap.description: Cap shaped like a . It makes those who wear it smile uncontrollably.

Grinning Tocotoco Cap Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Grinning Tocotoco Cap (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Grizzbolt's Minigun.description: Makes fire a minigun when ridden.

Ground Grenade.description: A Ground Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.

Gumoss Cap Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Gumoss Cap (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Gumoss Leaf.description: Leaf dropped from a . Fresh and sticky, it is used to make clothing.

Gunpowder.description: Gunpowder used to fire ammunition. Required to make bullets.

Hand-held Torch.description: Lights up dark areas and keeps you warm. Can also be used for close range combat in a pinch.

Handgun.description: A handgun with improved capacity and rapid-fire capabilities. Has more immediate firepower than a Makeshift Handgun.

Handgun Ammo.description: Ammo for the Handgun and similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Handgun Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Handgun (). Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Handgun Schematic 2.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Handgun (). Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Hanging Trap.description: Trap that catches Pals passing through it. Pals caught in the trap are easier to catch with Spheres. Only effective on small Pals.

Hangyu Cryst's Glove.description: Gloves for modifying the performance of the equipped glider, if is in your team.

Hangyu's Gloves.description: Gloves for modifying the performance of the equipped glider, if is in your team.

Heat Resistant Metal Armor.description: Improved Metal Armor. Boasts high heat resistance.

Heat Resistant Metal Armor Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Heat Resistant Metal Armor (). Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Heat Resistant Pal Metal Armor.description: Improved Pal Metal Armor. Boasts high heat resistance.

Heat Resistant Pelt Armor.description: A Pelt Armor produced in hot regions. Boasts high heat resistance.

Heat Resistant Pelt Armor Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Heat Resistant Pelt Armor (). Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Heat Resistant Refined Metal Armor.description: Improved Refined Metal Armor. Boasts high heat resistance.

Heat Resistant Refined Metal Armor Schem.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Heat Resistant Refined Metal Armor (). Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Heat Resistant Undershirt.description: An accessory that raises Heat Resistance.

Heat Resistant Undershirt +1.description: An accessory that raises Heat Resistance.

Heat Resistant Undershirt +2.description: An accessory that raises Heat Resistance.

Heater.description: A device that blows warm air, raising the temperature of a base. It doesn't provide much warmth, but helps one to endure somewhat cold environments. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

Heavy Weight Module.description: Equipping it makes the sphere heavier, reducing its range but increasing its capture power.

Helmet.description: A tough helmet that protects its wearer's head. It was apparently made after a number of people injured their heads after taking a tumble off a .

Helmet Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Helmet (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Herb Roasted Caprity.description: Mild roast filled with the natural aromas of herbs and berries embedded in the meat. Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.

Herb Roasted Lamball.description: Indulging in an abundance of fresh berries creates a tantalizing aroma that accentuates the unique flavor of mutton. Eating it will increase by +10% for a period of time.

Hexolite Quartz.description: A rare crystal found only in Feybreak. Over many years, Paladium has condensed and transformed, now shining with a rainbow-like glow.

Hexolite Quartz Mine.description: Facility for producing Hexolite Quartzs. Digging Hexolite Quartzs is grueling physical work. Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

High Grade Medical Supplies.description: High Grade Medical Supplies that are effective at treating and . Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

High Grade Technical Manual.description: A book that contains secrets of amazing technology. Use it to obtain a few Technology Points.

High Quality Bait.description: Bait that lures in Pals. Improved from Simple Bait to increase the chances of Pals biting the bait.

High Quality Cloth.description: High Quality Cloth woven from a large amount of Wool. Required to create high quality armor. Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

High Quality Hot Spring.description: Facility where Pals on base can rest. Now comfier and restores more SAN.

High Quality Pal Oil.description: High-quality oil that can be extracted from Pal. Necessary for making Polymer.

High Quality Recovery Meds.description: Medicine that heals wounds over time. High quality; restores a lot of Health.

High Quality Workbench.description: An Assembly Line for producing items and gear. A small workspace limits production speeds. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Hip Lantern.description: A lantern that can be attached to the hip. It lights up automatically at night. You can also switch its lighting mode to keep it on at all times. Just one is enough to find your way in the dark.

Homeward Thundercloud.description: Transports you to the nearest base. Cannot be used in dungeons and other similar locations.

Homing Sphere Launcher.description: A launcher for firing spheres. Fired spheres home in on Pals.

Honey.description: Honey harvested from . It's sweet and tasty.

Horizontal Wall Ivy.description: Decorative horizontal ivy. Can be placed on a wall.

Horn.description: Horn collected from Pals. Used to create medicines and more.

Hot Milk.description: Even more delicious when warmed up. Great for keeping hunger away.

Hot Spring.description: Facility where Pals on base can rest. Restores SAN after a long day of hard work.

Houseplant Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Place plants around your base for a splash of color.

Huge Feed Bag.description: A extra-large pouch for holding food. Unlocks 4 food slots in your inventory. Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry. Carrying one is enough.

Human-Powered Generator.description: A facility that converts rotational motion into electrical energy. The efficiency is low, and the Pals working here will experience a decrease in SAN value, but they will gain experience points.

Hyper Glider.description: A glider for soaring through the air. Its performance has been further improved, with increased speed and lift.

Hyper Grappling Gun.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. As a result of research, it has achieved overwhelming mobility.

Hyper Shield.description: Strange shield made with Paldium technology. It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while. Through repeated testing, the highest quality has been achieved.

Hyper Sphere.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Enhanced capabilities allow it to capture even more powerful Pals.

Ice Grenade.description: A Ice Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, freezing the surrounding area.

Ice Mine.description: Trap that freezes the Pal that steps on it. The frozen Pal has a higher capture rate with the sphere.

Ice Organ.description: Material obtainable from Pals. Can be used to make Ice Mine and more.

Improved Furnace.description: Allows refinement of Refined Ingot. The quality has improved, but the processing speed is still unsatisfactory. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

Incendiary Grenade.description: A Incendiary Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, setting the surrounding area on fire.

Ingot.description: A material required to create metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore using a furnace.

Innovative Technical Manual.description: A book that contains secrets of cutting-edge technology. Use it to obtain Technology Points.

Intermediate Fishing Rod (Cattiva).description: A fishing rod designed for catching Pals. Use it with bait near water where shadows are visible to start fishing. It boasts improved performance, making catches a bit easier.

Iron Gate.description: Gate large enough for big Pals to pass through. Made from metal, it is extremely durable.

Iron Wall Shelf.description: Iron wall shelf for storing items. Can be placed on a wall.

Ironwood Table Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Match with metal structures and enjoy life with your Pals.

Jam-filled Bun.description: Bread with jam spread on it. The sweetness of the berries complements it perfectly.

Japanese-Style Structure Set.description: Set for building bases using Japanese-style architecture. Allows building of Japanese-style foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

Jolthog Cryst's Gloves.description: Rubber gloves for handling . Activate its Partner Skill to throw as an ice grenade.

Jolthog's Gloves.description: Rubber gloves for handling . Activate its Partner Skill to throw as a shock grenade.

Katana.description: Katana for close-range combat. Slices through with razor-sharp precision, cutting cleanly in one strike.

Katress Cap Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Katress Cap (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Katress Hair.description: Hair dropped from a . Soft and supple, it is used to make clothing.

Killamari Tentacle.description: Tentacle dropped from a . Strange in texture, it is used to make clothing.

Killamari's Gloves.description: Gloves for modifying the performance of the equipped glider, if is in your team.

Ladder.description: A ladder that allows you to climb to a slightly higher place.

Lamball Kebab.description: Spiced and roasted mutton. Deeply complex with unique flavors.

Lamball Mutton.description: meat. Red meat with a unique flavor. Delicious, but takes some getting used to.

Lamp.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. Requires electricity, but lights up a larger area.

Large Ceiling Lamp.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. It can be placed on a ceiling. Requires a significant amount of electricity, but lights up an even larger area.

Large Container.description: Large container for storing items. Imitates the designs left behind by an ancient and prosperous civilization.

Large Feed Bag.description: A large pouch for holding food. Unlocks 3 food slots in your inventory. Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry. Carrying one is enough.

Large Incubator.description: Device for incubating Pal eggs. It automatically maintains a suitable temperature and can hatch multiple eggs at once.

Large Mounted Lamp.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. Requires a significant amount of electricity, but lights up an even larger area.

Large Pal Bed.description: A fluffy bed that Pals can get a good rest on. Pals can rest on it when injured, or to sleep at night. Even large Pals can sleep soundly on a bed like this.

Large Pal Soul.description: A spirit left behind by a large Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Large Toolbox.description: Place in base to improve handiwork speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Laser Rifle.description: A weapon that fires high-energy lasers. It has impressive firepower and is easy to handle.

Laser Rifle Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Laser Rifle (). Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Leather.description: Leather taken from a Pal, it serves as a defensive material. It can be obtained from certain Pals.

Leather Chair Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Leather screams luxury.

Leezpunk Crest.description: Crest dropped from a . Sharp and pointy, it is used to make clothing.

Legendary Sphere.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Very few Pals can escape its perfected design.

Lettuce.description: A leafy green. When it comes to salad, this is a must. It has an exquisitely crunchy texture and refreshing taste.

Lettuce Plantation.description: A farm that can grow Lettuce. It takes time to harvest, but increases the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

Lettuce Seeds.description: Seeds that produce Lettuce. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Life Fruit.description: Precious fruit that is extremely difficult to obtain. Slightly increases a Pal's Health.

Lifmunk Effigy.description: A mysterious Pal effigy that can be found all around the Palpagos Islands. Players can enhance their abilities by offering them to a certain statue.

Lifmunk's Submachine Gun.description: Submachine gun made specifically for . Activate its Partner Skill, and Lifmunk will ride on your head and fire at enemies.

Lily's Spear.description: The spear cherished by Lily. Punishes those who neglect their Pals.

Locker.description: Locker for storing items. Decorated with Pal stickers.

Lockpicking Tool v1.description: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Copper Key.

Lockpicking Tool v2.description: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Silver Key.

Lockpicking Tool v3.description: No key? No problem! These tools will allow you to try and pry open any treasure chest that would normally require a Gold Key.

Logging Site.description: A facility for producing Wood. Cutting wood is hard work that requires much physical endurance. Leave it to Pals skilled in logging.

Long Iron Shelf.description: Long iron shelf for storing items.

Long-eared Headband.description: A cute headband with ears modeled after a . It doesn't provide much head protection.

Long-eared Headband Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Long-Eared Headband (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Low Grade Medical Supplies.description: Low Grade Medical Supplies good for Sick, Sprain, and Overfull. They don't heal Health when eaten, however.

Low Quality Recovery Meds.description: Medicine that heals wounds over time. Low quality, but restores some Health.

Machine Gun Ammo.description: Ammo for Machingun and other similar weapons.

Magnum Ammo.description: Ammo for Magnum and other similar weapons.

Makeshift Assault Rifle.description: An assault rifle handmade from scraps. It excels in rate of fire and long range, but its single-shot power is low.

Makeshift Handgun.description: A handgun created from spare parts. Relatively well suited for close-quarters combat, but fires only one shot at a time.

Makeshift Handgun Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Makeshift Handgun (). Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Makeshift Handgun Schematic 2.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Makeshift Handgun (). Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Makeshift Handgun Schematic 3.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Makeshift Handgun (). Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Makeshift Handgun Schematic 4.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Makeshift Handgun (). Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Makeshift SMG.description: A submachine gun handmade from scraps. It excels in rate of fire, but its single-shot power is low.

Makeshift Shotgun.description: A shotgun handmade from scraps. It has a short range but excels in close-range combat

Mammorest Meat.description: meat. With massive size comes massive flavor. Its overwhelming portions are sure to satisfy any glutton.

Mammorest Steak.description: Boasts a rich and dignified flavor. Memories of glaciers and deep forests come rushing back with every bite.

Marinated Mushrooms.description: A dish made by marinating Mushrooms in a marinade. Eating it improves by +10% for a period of time.

Meat Cleaver.description: Knife for butchering Pals. When equipped, the Pet command becomes Butcher. Butchered Pals will be gone for good.

Medical Supplies.description: Strange Medical Supplies that are effective at treating and . Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

Medicine Rack.description: A shelf for storing medicine. Sick Pals will come here to take their medicine. Be sure to keep the medicine stocked.

Medieval Medicine Workbench.description: A facility for making Pal medicine. It can only produce simple medicines. Leave its operation to a Pal that can make medicine.

Medium Pal Soul.description: A spirit left behind by a Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Mega Glider.description: A glider for soaring through the air. A mass produced commercial model, it’s decently fast.

Mega Grappling Gun.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. Since it's upgraded, it now has greater range.

Mega Shield.description: Strange shield made with Paldium technology. It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while. The new model has been improved, enhancing its defense.

Mega Sphere.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Its capabilities have been improved, allowing it to catch a wider range of Pals.

Memory Wiping Medicine.description: A potion that allows the player to reset their status points when consumed. It has no effect if consumed by a Pal.

Metal Armor.description: Armor made of metal. Somewhat heavy, but provides good defense.

Metal Armor Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Metal Armor (). Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Metal Armor Schematic 2.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Metal Armor (). Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Metal Axe.description: An axe for cutting wood. Made from metal, it chops through Hardwood with ease, making it useful for harvesting sturdy trees that grow deep within the continent.

Metal Barrel Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Not suitable for doing keg stands.

Metal Chair and Desk Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Match with metal structures and enjoy life with your Pals.

Metal Chest.description: Stores items. Reinforced with metal, it is somewhat durable. The increased size allows for the storage of more things.

Metal Defensive Wall.description: Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions. Made from metal, it is extremely durable.

Metal Detector.description: Using this reveals hidden Chromite deposits in dungeons, marking them for easier mining. Deposits will become unmarked if you move too far away.

Metal Helm.description: A helm made of metal. A reliable piece of armor that protects your head, and all the thoughts within.

Metal Helm Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Metal Helm (). Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Metal Pickaxe.description: A pickaxe used for mining. Made from metal, its durability and efficiency have improved.

Metal Shelf Set.description: Metal shelf set. Can store items.

Metal Spear.description: Useful for close-range combat. The metal tip give it an increased attack power. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

Metal Structure Set.description: Set for building bases using metal. Allows building of metal foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

Meteor Launcher.description: A phenomenal weapon that fires a meteor. Upon striking its target, it creates an explosion similar to a meteorite impact.

Meteor launcher.description: A phenomenal weapon that fires a meteor. Upon striking its target, it creates an explosion similar to a meteorite impact.

Might Elixir.description: Extremely valuable elixir that permanently raises Attack when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Might Remedy.description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Attack by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Milk.description: Drink it as is, or use it in various meals. Can be milked from .

Mill.description: Facility for milling Wheat to produce Flour. Requires Pal with the Watering trait to spin the water turbine.

Mind Control Meds.description: Mind Control Meds that are extremely effective in controlling dissidents. Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

Mine.description: Trap that explodes when a Pal steps on it. It deals damage to a wide area.

Missile Ammo.description: Ammo for the Guided Missile Launcher and similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Monarch's Crown.description: A crown for those who possess a high ranking. Being quite heavy, it's not suited for practical use.

Monarch's Crown Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Monarch's Crown (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Monitoring Stand.description: Command your Pals to work on various things inside a base. You can allow or prohibit individual kinds of work.

Mossanda Lux's Grenade Launcher.description: Makes fire a grenade launcher when ridden.

Mossanda's Grenade Launcher.description: Makes fire a grenade launcher when ridden.

Mounted Crossbow.description: A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies. When a Pal with Handiwork suitability is assigned, it will continuously defend the base using a crossbow.

Mounted Machine Gun.description: A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies. When a Pal with Handiwork suitability is assigned, it will continuously defend the base using a machine gun.

Mounted Missile Launcher.description: A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies. When a Pal with Handiwork suitability is assigned, it will continuously defend the base using a missile launcher.

Mounted Torch.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

Mozzarina Cheeseburger.description: Now with cheese, this dish has reached the highest level of fine cuisine. Eating it will increase by +20% and stay full longer for a period of time.

Mozzarina Hamburger.description: The rich flavor of beef melds with the sweetness of the buns in perfect harmony in this masterpiece. Eating it will increase work speed and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

Mozzarina Meat.description: meat. Thick, juicy and marbled. Residents of Palpagos Island cherish it above all other meats.

Mozzarina Steak.description: Thick, well-done steak. Strong flavors give those who eat it an energy boost.

Multiclimate Undershirt.description: An accessory that raises Heat and Cold Resistance.

Multiclimate Undershirt +1.description: An accessory that raises Heat and Cold Resistance.

Multiclimate Undershirt +2.description: An accessory that raises Heat and Cold Resistance.

Mushroom.description: A mushroom that can be eaten raw. They can be found anywhere on the island.

Mushroom Soup.description: Cream soup made of Mushrooms. Eating it allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

Musket.description: Simple, old fashioned gun. Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time.

Mysterious Mushroom.description: Mushrooms that are not suitable for eating raw. Eating makes one more prone to feeling hungry.

Mysterious Mushroom Juice.description: Mushroom juice known for its incredibly uplifting effect. Drinking it greatly boosts work speed for a period of time, but drastically decreases SAN value.

Nail.description: Necessary for building various facilities. Can be made with a Primitive Workbench.

Nightstar Sand.description: Sand that can be found in the desert at night. Used as a material for crafting certain accessories and other items.

Normal Parachute.description: A glider for soaring through the air. Cheaply made, it isn't very fast.

Old Bow.description: Primitive long range weapon. Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.

Old Bow Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Old Bow (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Old Revolver.description: A slightly outdated revolving handgun. Compared to Handgun default, it excels in single-shot power.

Old TV.description: Decorative old TV. Left behind by an ancient civilization. Now it only shows images of Pengullet.

Omelet.description: A dish made by frying an Egg and topping it with ketchup. Eating it improves by +10% for a period of time.

Onion.description: A cherished and easy-to-grow vegetable with a rich history. Not suitable for eating raw.

Orange Locker.description: Orange locker for storing items. Decorated with Pal stickers.

Ore.description: Becomes an ingot when refined using a furnace. Can be found in caves and other places.

Ore Mining Site.description: Facility for producing Ore. Mining Ore is hard work that requires physical endurance. Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

Ore Mining Site II.description: Facility for producing large quantities of Ore. Mining Ore is hard work that requires physical endurance. Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

Outdoor Furniture Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Spruces up the outside of your base.

Pal Dressing Facility.description: Pal Dressing Facility. Give your Pals a new look! Skins obtained inside and outside the game can be applied here!

Pal Essence Condenser.description: A chamber for increasing a Pal's rank. Pals can surpass their physical limitations if given a concentrated extract taken from a Pal of the same type.

Pal Expedition Station.description: A facility that allows Pals to be sent on expeditions to places like dungeons. The dispatched Pals engage in battles and gather items, bringing back resources to the base.

Pal Fluids.description: Bodily fluids taken from a Water Pal. Their high viscosity makes them a handy material.

Pal Gear Workbench.description: A Primitive Workbench for producing Pal tools. Make a saddle to ride Pals, or make a gun for Pals to use.

Pal Labor Research Laboratory.description: A facility for conducting research on the various tasks of Pals. By assigning tasks to Pals in this facility, research progresses, granting various benefits.

Pal Metal Armor.description: Armor made from Pal Metal Ingot. High defense, but extremely heavy. Equipment for a hero, it exudes bravery.

Pal Metal Armor Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Pal Metal Armor (). Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Pal Metal Axe.description: An axe for chopping wood. It has achieved extraordinary sharpness thanks to Pal Metal. It can slice through high-grade trees from the harshest regions without trouble.

Pal Metal Helm.description: A helm made from Pal Metal Ingot. Envied for its immaculate quality, it is proof of a chosen warrior.

Pal Metal Ingot.description: A material required to create Pal Metal weapons and armor. Strengthened by creating an alloy incorporating Paldium.

Pal Metal Pickaxe.description: A pickaxe for mining. It has achieved extraordinary efficiency thanks to Pal Metal.

Pal Recovery Grenade.description: A Frag Grenade with healing effects. It bursts on impact, restoring HP to allied Pals.

Pal Reverser.description: A mysterious medicine that can change a Pal's gender. Can be used at the Pal Surgery Table.

Pal Sphere.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. This basic model is only effective on low level Pals.

Pal Surgery Table.description: A facility where surgery can be performed on Pals to change their gender or passive skills.

Palbox.description: Facility for storing captured Pals. Pals inside gradually recover Health. Area around this facility becomes a base.

Paldium Fragment.description: Crystallized energy from the World Tree. Capable of creating supernatural items and structures.

Pancake.description: A dish made by mixing Flour and Milk together then baking. Eating it progressively decreases the rate at which one's sanity decreases for a period of time.

Pelt Armor.description: Armor made from Leather. Its warmth and defense have been improved.

Pelt Armor Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Pelt Armor (). Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Pelt Armor Schematic 3.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Pelt Armor (). Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Pelt Armor Schematic 4.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Pelt Armor (). Can be crafted at High-Quality Workbench.

Pendant of Diligence.description: An accessory that raises Work Speed.

Pendant of Diligence +1.description: An accessory that raises Work Speed.

Pendant of Diligence +2.description: An accessory that raises Work Speed.

Pengullet's Rocket Launcher.description: Rocket launcher for launching . Activate its Partner Skill to fire Pengullet and damage enemies. After firing, will become incapacitated.

Penking Cap Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Penking Cap (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Penking Plume.description: Plume dropped from a . Bright and colorful, it is used to make clothing.

Piano Furniture Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Place in your base and dream about living a life of luxury.

Pizza.description: A dish made by piling Red Berries, Tomato and cheese on Bread. Eating it slightly improves work speed and allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

Plasteel.description: Plasteel created by processing Crude Oil and metal. Can be produced in a Electric Furnace.

Poison Arrow.description: Poison Arrows for use with bows. Afflicts target with on contact. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Poison Arrow Crossbow.description: A Crossbow that inflicts poison on its target. Poisoned Pals are easier to capture. Requires Poison Arrow.

Poison Bow.description: Frightening bow that poisons its target. Poisoned Pals are easier to capture. Requires Poison Arrow.

Polymer.description: Polymer made from refined oil. Required for producing various advanced items such as firearms. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Potato.description: A hardy and filling crop that grows in any terrain. Not suitable for raw consumption.

Potato Seeds.description: Seeds that produce Potato. Necessary for starting a farm.

Power Fruit.description: Precious fruit that is extremely difficult to obtain. Slightly increases a Pal's Attack.

Power Generator.description: A power generator fueled by Electric Pals. Electric equipment won't run without this.

Precious Claw.description: Extremely sharp claws collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Precious Dragon Stone.description: A gemstone-like ball collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Precious Entrails.description: A heart that never stops beating collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Precious Pelt.description: Fluffy fur collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Precious Plume.description: Glittering feathers collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Predator Core.description: Core dropped by Predator Pals. It is filled with mysterious energy.

Primitive Furnace.description: Allows refinement of Ingot. The quality leaves much to desire, and processing is slow. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

Primitive Workbench.description: A Primitive Workbench for producing simple items. Requires a Pal that can work with their hands.

Production Assembly Line.description: An Assembly Line for producing items and gear. By splitting Pals into groups, production speeds have somewhat increased. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Production Assembly Line II.description: An Assembly Line for producing items and gear. Through clever management, production speeds have greatly increased. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Pump-Action Shotgun.description: A high capacity, powerful shotgun. It has outstanding close range DPS.

Pump-Action Shotgun Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Pump-Action Shotgun (). Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line.

Pure Quartz.description: Pure Quartz often found in snowy fields and similar places. Required to create Circuit Board.

Radar Sphere.description: A sphere that captures Pals when thrown. Though it has a low chance of success, it can forcibly capture another person’s Pal.

Ranch.description: Farm for raising sheep and fowl-like Pals. Assign a Pal with the appropriate Partner Skill to a farm to produce items.

Raw Dumud.description: meat. Fatty with a rich taste. Has a mouthwatering plump texture.

Raw Kelpsea.description: meat. Tender and slightly sweet. Fish meat tends to spoil quickly.

Recovery Meds.description: Medicine that heals wounds over time. Restores a decent amount of Health.

Red Berries.description: A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked. They can be found anywhere on the island.

Refined Ingot.description: A material required to create high quality metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore and Coal using a furnace.

Refined Metal Armor.description: Armor made from high quality metal. Quite heavy, but provides excellent defense.

Refined Metal Armor Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Refined Metal Armor (). Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Refined Metal Axe.description: An axe for cutting wood. Made from high quality metal, its sharpness and durability has improved even further. It can harvest Hardwood from sturdy trees that grow in unforgiving lands.

Refined Metal Chest.description: Stores items. Made of iron, it is extremely durable. It is useful as a large, secure storage box.

Refined Metal Helm.description: A helm made from high quality metal. The luster from the polished metal gives the wearer that added boost of confidence.

Refined Metal Helm Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Refined Metal Helm (). Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Refined Metal Pickaxe.description: A pickaxe used for mining. Its durability and efficiency have further improved.

Refined Metal Spear.description: Useful for close-range combat. The high-quality metal tip give it an increased attack power. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

Refrigerator.description: Large food vault. Assign an Ice Pal to help prevent food stored inside from spoiling.

Reindrix Stew.description: Stewed vegetables and venison that was reared in a frigid environment. The meat's soft texture melts away to reveal a delicate sweetness. Eating it will stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

Reindrix Venison.description: meat. Strange venison capable of remaining at low temperatures. Takes a very long time to spoil.

Relaxaurus Lux's Missile Launcher.description: Makes fire a missile launcher when ridden.

Relaxaurus's Missile Launcher.description: Makes fire a missile launcher when ridden.

Repair Bench.description: Workbench for repairing broken tools. Materials are needed to make repairs.

Repair Kit.description: Tools for repairing structures. Use it on destroyed structures to repair them.

Retro Street Lamp.description: Retro street lamp that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

Revival Potion.description: A potion that revives a Pal that has been injured and is unable to move.

Ribbuny Headband Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Ribbuny Headband (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Ribbuny Ribbon.description: Ribbon dropped from a . Cute in color and design, it is used to make clothing.

Rifle Ammo.description: Ammo for the Single-Shot Rifle and similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Ring of Dark Resistance.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Dark damage.

Ring of Dark Resistance +1.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Dark damage.

Ring of Dark Resistance +2.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Dark damage.

Ring of Dragon Resistance.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Dragon damage.

Ring of Dragon Resistance +1.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Dragon damage.

Ring of Dragon Resistance +2.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Dragon damage.

Ring of Earth Resistance.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Ground damage.

Ring of Earth Resistance +1.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Ground damage.

Ring of Earth Resistance +2.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Ground damage.

Ring of Flame Resistance.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Fire damage.

Ring of Flame Resistance +1.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Fire damage.

Ring of Flame Resistance +2.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Fire damage.

Ring of Grass Resistance.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Grass damage.

Ring of Grass Resistance +1.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Grass damage.

Ring of Grass Resistance +2.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Grass damage.

Ring of Ice Resistance.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Ice damage.

Ring of Ice Resistance +1.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Ice damage.

Ring of Ice Resistance +2.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Ice damage.

Ring of Lightning Resistance.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Electric damage.

Ring of Lightning Resistance +1.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Electric damage.

Ring of Lightning Resistance +2.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Electric damage.

Ring of Mercy.description: Pacifist's ring. The wearer's attacks will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

Ring of Water Resistance.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Water damage.

Ring of Water Resistance +1.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Water damage.

Ring of Water Resistance +2.description: An accessory that reduces incoming Water damage.

Road Sign Set.description: Decorative furniture set. No roads mean no traffic control.

Roast Eikthyrdeer.description: Carefully roasted venison with delicate flavor notes, accented by the aromas of the deep forest. Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.

Roast Reindrix.description: When taken from a flame, Reindrix meat rapidly drops in temperature. This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time, making it a perfect emergency ration.

Roast Rushoar.description: Boar grilled over a hearty flame. Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside. Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.

Rocket Ammo.description: Ammo for the Rocket Launcher and similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Assembly Line II.

Rocket Launcher.description: A Rocket Launcher that can fire a powerful round from long distances.

Ruby.description: A gemstone that glows red. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Rushoar Bacon 'n' Eggs.description: The smoky essence of bacon intertwines flawlessly with the gentle texture of eggs, creating a sublime harmony of flavors. Eating it will increase by +10% for a period of time.

Rushoar Hot Dog.description: Thick sausage wedged between warm buns. The crisply seared meat and spicy flavors are to die for. Eating it will increase by +20% for a period of time.

Rushoar Pork.description: meat. Full of the delicious flavors of wild game. Juicy and nutritious.

SMG.description: A submachine gun with exceptional rate of fire. It’s easy to handle and effective in close-range combat.

Salad.description: A Salad made by mixing Lettuce and Tomato. Eating it slightly improves work speed for a period of time.

Sand Bag.description: A defensive installation for protecting a base from enemies. When a Pal is assigned, it will stop other work and stay on lookout and prepare for combat.

Sapphire.description: A gemstone that glows blue. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Scatter Sphere Launcher.description: A new type of launcher that fires a large number of spheres. It can easily capture a herd of Pals.

Semi-Auto Shotgun.description: A rapid-fire shotgun with immense power. Its close-range damage output is top-notch.

Shock Grenade.description: A Shock Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, electrocuting everything in the blast radius.

Shoddy Bed.description: A shoddy bed for humans. Use it when injured or to sleep at night. You won't be able to sleep soundly without a roof over your head.

Shotgun Shells.description: Ammo for shotgun and similar weapons. Can be crafted at Weapon Workbench.

Sign.description: Can be written on. Use for memos or to communicate with others.

Silk Hat.description: A gentleman's hat. Those made from materials are considered luxury items, but those made from materials are of poor quality, and more commonly found.

Silk Hat Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Silk Hat (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Silo.description: Place in base to improve planting speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Silver Key.description: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

Simple Street Lamp.description: Simple street lamp that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

Single-Shot Rifle.description: A single-shot rifle. Takes time to load. What it lacks in capacity, it makes up for with sheer power.

Single-Shot Sphere Launcher.description: A launcher that fires spheres. It can capture Pals from a greater distance.

Small Feed Bag.description: A small pouch for holding food. Unlocks a food slot in your inventory. Players and Pals automatically consume food when hungry. Carrying one is enough.

Small Pal Soul.description: A spirit left behind by a small Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Small Pouch.description: A small pouch that allows you to carry additional items. Holding it increases your inventory slots. Carrying one is enough.

Small Wall Ivy.description: Decorative small ivy. Can be placed on a wall.

Sniper Module.description: Equipping it increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power.

Snowman.description: Place in base to improve cooling speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Soccer Goal.description: Decorative soccer goal. Kicking a into it will get you no points.

Soft Hat.description: A light and flexible cap perfect for everyday use. Fashionable, it was once a popular item on the island.

Soft Hat Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Soft Hat (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Spear.description: Useful for close-range combat. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

Speed Elixir.description: Extremely valuable elixir that permanently raises Work Speed when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Speed Remedy.description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Work Speed by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Sphere Assembly Line.description: An Assembly Line for producing spheres used for capturing Pals. By splitting Pals into groups, production speeds have somewhat increased. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Sphere Assembly Line II.description: An Assembly Line for producing spheres used for capturing Pals. Through clever management, production speeds have greatly increased. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Sphere Workbench.description: A Primitive Workbench for producing spheres used for capturing Pals. A small workspace keeps the production speed slow. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Stamina Elixir.description: Extremely valuable elixir that permanently raises Stamina when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Stamina Remedy.description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Stamina by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Statue of Power.description: Stone statue spoken of in legends on Palpagos Island. Offer up Lifmunk Effigy to receive strange powers.

Stewed Galeclaw.description: Slow-cooked dish that exudes a burst of rich, wild flavors. Eating it will make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

Stone.description: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by mining rocks.

Stone Axe.description: An axe for cutting wood. Made from stone, it's not very sharp.

Stone Gate.description: Gate large enough for big Pals to pass through. Made from stone, it is reasonably sturdy.

Stone Pickaxe.description: A pickaxe used for mining. Made from stone, the efficiency is questionable.

Stone Pit.description: A facility for producing Stone. Mining Stone is hard work that requires much physical endurance. Leave it to Pals skilled at mining.

Stone Spear.description: Useful for close-range combat. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

Stone Structure Set.description: Set for building bases using stone. Allows building of stone foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

Storage Container Set.description: Container furniture set. Can store items.

Stout Fruit.description: Precious fruit that is extremely difficult to obtain. Slightly increases a Pal's Defense.

Strange Juice.description: Juice that greatly improves mood when consumed. Drinking it significantly increases work speed for a period of time, but significantly lowers SAN.

Straw Pal Bed.description: A straw bed for Pals. Pals can rest on it when injured, or to sleep at night. It isn't soft, but it's better than nothing.

Street Lamp Set.description: Street lamp set to provide illumination. Requires electricity to light.

Stump and Axe.description: Place in base to improve logging speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Stun Baton.description: Close range weapon that sends out an electric jolt upon contact. Pals are easier to capture when electrocuted.

Stylish Street Lamp.description: Stylish street lamp that provides illumination. Requires electricity to light.

Sulfur.description: Sulfur that can be found in volcanoes and such. Necessary for making Gunpowder.

Sulfur Mine.description: Facility for producing Sulfur. Digging Sulfur is grueling physical work. Leave it to a Pal that is good at mining.

Summoning Altar.description: Offer a Slab depicting a Pal to summon a powerful Pal to your base. Adequate caution and battle readiness is paramount.

Suspicious Juice.description: Juice that improves mood when consumed. Drinking it increases work speed for a period of time, but lowers SAN.

Swee Hair.description: Hair dropped from a . Fluffy and soft, it is used to make clothing.

Sword.description: Sword for close-range combat. The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure. Requires Weapon Workbench to craft.

Tanzee's Assault Rifle.description: Assault rifle made specifically for . Activate its Partner Skill, and will enter gunner mode and begin shooting at nearby enemies.

Thermal Undershirt.description: An accessory that raises Cold Resistance.

Thermal Undershirt +1.description: An accessory that raises Cold Resistance.

Thermal Undershirt +2.description: An accessory that raises Cold Resistance.

Three Shot Bow.description: An enhanced bow that allows three arrows to be fired simultaneously. By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single Arrow when fired.

Tocotoco Cap.description: Cap shaped like a . Its gaudy design is visible from far away.

Tocotoco Cap Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Tocotoco Cap (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Tocotoco Feather.description: Feathers dropped from a . Used to make clothing, as the beautifully vivid colors are quite popular.

Tocotoco's Gloves.description: Gloves for gently holding . Activate its Partner Skill to hold and use it to fire explosive eggs.

Tomato.description: A fresh ingredient that brightens any dish. Filled with lycopene, they’re also very healthy.

Tomato Plantation.description: A farm that can grow Tomato. They take time to harvest, but increase the variety of meals you can prepare. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest the crops.

Tomato Seeds.description: Seeds that produce Tomato. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Tombstone.description: A gravestone that can be inscribed with text. Use it for recording purposes.

Traffic Control Set.description: Decorative furniture set. No roads mean no traffic control.

Training Crystal.description: Strange crystal that when given to a Pal raises its level by one.

Training Dummy.description: Training dummy shaped like a . Can only be placed in wide open areas.

Training Manual (L).description: Training manual that grants a large amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

Training Manual (M).description: Training manual that grants a small amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

Training Manual (S).description: Training manual that grants a tiny amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

Training Manual (XL).description: Training manual that grants a substantial amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

Tricorne.description: A cap for those who love to fight. Its previous owner nearly drove to extinction.

Tricorne Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Tricorne (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Tropical Outfit.description: A Cloth Outfit produced in hot regions. Boasts high heat resistance.

Tropical Outfit Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Tropical Outfit (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Tundra Outfit.description: A Cloth Outfit produced in cold regions. Useful for surviving in cold climates.

Tundra Outfit Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Tundra Outfit (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Ultimate Sphere.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Almost no Pals can escape its flawless design.

Ultra Shield.description: Strange shield made with Paldium technology. It automatically repairs itself after not taking damage for a while. As a result of further experiments, ultimate quality has been achieved.

Ultra Sphere.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Not many Pals can escape its highly efficient design.

Upright Piano.description: Decorative upright piano. Cannot be played.

Venom Gland.description: Material obtainable from poisonous Pals. Can be used to make Poison Arrow and more.

Viewing Cage.description: Container for observing captured Pals. Pals inside cannot participate in battle or production, but they do not become hungry.

Vital Elixir.description: Extremely valuable elixir that permanently raises Health when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Vital Remedy.description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Health by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Wall Torch.description: A light source that provides illumination to a base even at night. It can be placed on walls. Requires a Fire Pal to light a flame.

Wall-Mounted Houseplant Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Place plants on your base's walls for a splash of color.

Wall-Mounted Sign.description: A signboard to write on. Can be hung on walls.

Wall-mounted Houseplant Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Place plants on your base's walls for a splash of color.

Water Fountain.description: Place in base to improve watering speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Water Grenade.description: A Water Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.

Weapon Assembly Line.description: An Assembly Line for producing weapons and ammunition. By splitting Pals into groups, production speeds have somewhat increased. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Weapon Assembly Line II.description: An Assembly Line for producing weapons and ammunition. Through clever management, production speeds have greatly increased. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Weapon Workbench.description: A Primitive Workbench for producing weapons and ammunition. A small workspace prevents the production of high quality weapons. Requires Pals that can work with their hands.

Wheat.description: An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes. Wheat is a common crop in many parts of the world.

Wheat Plantation.description: A farm that can grow Wheat. It requires an average amount of time to harvest. Requires a few Pals to plant seeds, water, and harvest crops.

Wheat Seeds.description: Seeds that produce Wheat. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Witch Cauldron.description: Place in base to improve medicine manufacturing speed. Placing more than one has no additional effect.

Witch Hat.description: A hat modeled after a or . It makes you feel like you can use Pal skills.

Witch Hat Schematic 1.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Witch Hat (). Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Witch's Crown (Ultra).description: Imbued with the ominous power of Bellanoir Libero (Ultra). A rarity only the most fortunate may obtain.

Wood.description: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by cutting trees.

Wooden Barrel Shelf.description: Wooden barrel shelf for storing items.

Wooden Chest.description: Stores items. Made from wood, it breaks easily. It's probably not the best thing to store valuables in.

Wooden Club.description: A Wooden Club for close range combat. Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.

Wooden Decorative Shelf.description: Decorative wooden shelf. Can be placed on a wall.

Wooden Defensive Wall.description: Massive defensive wall to prevent enemy intrusions. Made from wood, it breaks easily.

Wooden Gate.description: Gate large enough for big Pals to pass through. Made from wood, it breaks easily.

Wooden Living Room Furniture Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Place furniture in your living space and enjoy life with your Pals.

Wooden Structure Set.description: Set for building bases using wood. Allows building of wooden foundations, walls, ceilings, stairs and other things necessary for shelters.

Wooden Tavern Cabinet Furniture Set.description: Set of wooden cabinets that look at home in a tavern. Can store items.

Wooden Tavern Furniture Set.description: Decorative furniture set. Set up a bar and enjoy life with your Pals.

Wooden Wall Shelf.description: Wooden shelf for storing items. Can be placed on a wall.

Wool.description: Material sheared from sheep Pals. A necessity for creating bedding, Cloth and more.
